base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of tileset_cave_dungeon — a tile (tile_atlas) from 1986 dragon quest. Cave/dungeon atlas — wall stones, floor, doors, lava-tile, hole-trap, pillar, chest-tile marker. Used in Erdrick's Cave, Charlock Castle, Hauksness ruins, Swamp Cave etc. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Cave/dungeon atlas — wall stones, floor, doors, lava-tile, hole-trap, pillar, chest-tile marker. Used in Erdrick's Cave, Charlock Castle, Hauksness ruins, Swamp Cave etc
